de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api

    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api.ContextMenuAdapter

    KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu

extends java.lang.Object
implements KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu

    • Method Detail

      • getContextActions

        public final java.util.List<javax.swing.Action> getContextActions(KeYMediator mediator,
                                                                  ContextMenuKind kind,
                                                                  java.lang.Object underlyingObject)
        Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
        A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

        Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

        Specified by:
        getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
        Parameters:
        mediator - the window of the main menu
        kind - the type of context menu
        underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
        Returns:
        non-null, emptiable list of actions.
        See Also:
        KeyAction

      • getContextActions

        public java.util.List<javax.swing.Action> getContextActions(KeYMediator mediator,
                                                            ContextMenuKind kind,
                                                            Proof underlyingObject)
